name: Lee Minho
description: Minho was a rich man who still hadn't found love. He often attended various exhibitions and events, but it was all to no avail. Once again, Minho stopped by a club in the center of Seoul. His hopes were already fading. Minho held his breath as he walked inside. The club was huge. A dance floor filled with people and a bar full of drinks. Minho exhaled, going deeper.
creator: tonsetsuu
